content.title: ሥዕል አዛምድ
content.description: እያንዳንዱን ቃል ከትክክለኛው ሥዕል ጋር አዛምድ።

stories.title: Lina and the Little Bird
stories.description: Lina found a little bird under a tree.

pages.text: Lina found a little bird under a tree.
She gave it water and waited quietly.
The bird’s family returned, and Lina smiled.

stories.title: The Helpful Hare
stories.description: A hare saw a tortoise carrying a heavy basket.

pages.text: A hare saw a tortoise carrying a heavy basket.
They carried it together to the village.
Helping made the long road feel short.

stories.title: The Seed of Patience
stories.description: Miki planted a seed and watered it each day.

pages.text: Miki planted a seed and watered it each day.
He waited while roots grew beneath the soil.
At last, a green leaf reached toward the sun.

stories.title: ሊና እና ትንሿ ወፍ
stories.description: ሊና ከዛፍ ሥር ትንሽ ወፍ አገኘች።

pages.text: ሊና ከዛፍ ሥር ትንሽ ወፍ አገኘች።
ውሃ ሰጠቻትና በጸጥታ ጠበቀች።
የወፏ ቤተሰብ ተመለሰና ሊና ፈገግ አለች።

stories.title: አጋዡ ጥንቸል
stories.description: ጥንቸል ከባድ ቅርጫት የተሸከመ ኤሊ አየ።

pages.text: ጥንቸል ከባድ ቅርጫት የተሸከመ ኤሊ አየ።
ቅርጫቱን አብረው ወደ መንደር ወሰዱ።
መረዳዳት ረጅሙን መንገድ አጠረው።

stories.title: የትዕግሥት ዘር
stories.description: ሚኪ ዘር ተከለና በየቀኑ ውሃ አጠጣው።

pages.text: ሚኪ ዘር ተከለና በየቀኑ ውሃ አጠጣው።
ሥሩ በአፈር ውስጥ ሲያድግ በትዕግሥት ጠበቀ።
በመጨረሻ አረንጓዴ ቅጠል ወደ ፀሐይ ወጣ።

stories.title: ሊና ወዑፍ ንእሽት
stories.description: ሊና ዑፈ ንእሽተ ታሕተ ዕፅ ረከበት።

pages.text: ሊና ዑፈ ንእሽተ ታሕተ ዕፅ ረከበት።
ማይ ወሀበታ ወተዓገሠት።
ቤተ ዑፍ ተመልሰ ወሊና ተፈሥሐት።

stories.title: ረዳኢ ጥንቸል
stories.description: ጥንቸል ኤሊን ከባድ ሸክም ሲሸከም አየ።

pages.text: ጥንቸል ኤሊን ከባድ ሸክም ሲሸከም አየ።
እኩ ወሰዱት እስከ ሀገር።
ርድኤት መንገድን አሳጠረ።
ሚኪ ዘርአ ተከለ ወማይ አስተየ።
ሥር በምድር ሲያድግ ጠበቀ።
ቅጠል አረንጓዴ ወደ ፀሐይ ወጣ።

stories.title: Liinaa fi Simbira Xiqqoo
stories.description: Liinaan muka jalatti simbira xiqqoo argite.

pages.text: Liinaan muka jalatti simbira xiqqoo argite.
Bishaan kenniteefii cal jettee eegde.
Maatiin simbirattii deebi’e; Liinaan ni kolfite.

stories.title: Illeettii Gargaartuu
stories.description: Illeettiin qocaa guuboo ulfaataa baatu argite.

pages.text: Illeettiin qocaa guuboo ulfaataa baatu argite.
Waliin guuboo sana gara gandaatti geessan.
Wal gargaaruun karaa dheeraa gabaabse.

stories.title: Sanyii Obsa
stories.description: Mikiin sanyii dhaabee guyyaa hunda bishaan obaase.

pages.text: Mikiin sanyii dhaabee guyyaa hunda bishaan obaase.
Hiddi lafa jalatti yeroo guddatu obsaan eege.
Dhumarratti baalli magariisaa gara aduutti ol ba’e.
